category_sources: source_facts.description says ssh3 is a faster and richer secure shell using HTTP/3.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives ssh3; source_facts.repo is the official SSH3 repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official repository README, the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/francoismichel/ssh3, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies secure shell over HTTP/3; source_facts.executables lists client and server binaries.
